result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com search results page for Miami Beach, showing filters and the first visible property result.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Miami Beach: 61 properties found”; “Wonderful: 9+”; “Beach”; “Sat, Jan 10 — Tue, Jan 13”; “2 adults · 0 children · 1 room”; “Monte Carlo by Miami Vacations”; “Beachfront”; “Wonderful 9.0”; “Location 9.5”; “Per night $289”; “$1,018”
selected_candidate:
Monte Carlo by Miami Vacations
constraint_evidence:
- Miami location: supported — search/breadcrumb/title show Miami Beach, Florida / Miami Beach results.
- Beach access: supported — visible “Beach” filter chip and property amenity “Beachfront”.
- User rating at least 9: supported — property shows “Wonderful 9.0”.
- 3-night stay: supported — dates Sat, Jan 10 to Tue, Jan 13 imply 3 nights.
- 2 adults: supported — visible “2 adults · 0 children · 1 room”.
- Starting from January 10, 2026: supported — visible check-in “Sat, Jan 10”.
- Hotel category: not_visible — visible result appears to be an apartment/property listing, not explicitly a hotel.
- Exact price/total budget requirement: not_visible — price is visible ($289/night, $1,018 total) but no explicit budget constraint was given.
action_target:
Send exit message to user / end task.
success_signals:
Visible result matches key constraints: Miami Beach, beachfront, rating 9.0, Jan 10–13, 2 adults.
failure_signals:
No explicit confirmation that the selected candidate is a hotel; only one result is visible and it may be an apartment lis

- hotel category: supported (listing is a hotel).
- price visible: supported ($1,355 total; per night $373).

Clicked an SVG element near the left side of the results page, likely a filter/expand control in the sidebar.

Selected result meets rating >=9, beach proximity, and stay length/adults constraints; visible booking button on the card.

result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Search results page on Booking.com for Miami Beach, with filters/search bar visible and first hotel card in view.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Miami Beach: 613 properties found”; “Sat, Jan 10 — Tue, Jan 13”; “2 adults · 0 children · 1 room”; “Beach Place Hotel”; “North Beach, Miami Beach”; “Beach Nearby”; “900 feet from beach”; “Very Good 8.0”; “Per night $157”; “$547”; “3 nights, 2 adults”.
selected_candidate:
Beach Place Hotel
constraint_evidence:
- Miami/Miami Beach location: supported (search/query and page title show Miami Beach).
- Beach access / near beach: supported (“Beach Nearby”, “900 feet from beach”).
- User rating at least 9: contradicted (visible rating is 8.0).
- 3-night stay: supported (“3 nights, 2 adults” and dates Jan 10–13).
- 2 adults: supported (“2 adults · 0 children · 1 room”).
- Starting from January 10, 2026: supported by visible dates (“Sat, Jan 10 — Tue, Jan 13”); year not explicitly shown in screenshot, but URL/context indicates the search is for Jan 10, 2026.
- Hotel category: supported (hotel listing “Beach Place Hotel”).
- Price/availability: supported (visible price $547 total, $157 per night).
action_target:
Scroll down to inspect more hotel results that may meet the 9+ rating constraint.
success_signals:
More listings appear below; a hotel with rating 9.0+ and beach access is found.
failure_signals:
No new results appear, or visible candidates continue to have ratings below 9.
uncertainty:
The screenshot does not explicitly show

observation.title: Booking.com: Hotels in Miami Beach. Book your hotel now!

args.query: early termination after reaching search results without selecting a qualifying hotel; possible failure to verify beach access and rating >=9 before exiting

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

evidence.claim: The final visible state on the search results page showed a candidate that matched the task constraints: Miami Beach location, beach access/proximity, rating 9.0, and stay dates Jan 10–13 for 2 adults.

High-detail inspection of step 14 identified the selected candidate as 'Monte Carlo by Miami Vacations' and marked beach access, rating >=9, 3-night stay, and 2 adults as supported by the visible page state.
The run ended by sending the exit message after the results page was visible; no additional interaction was needed to satisfy the requested filters according to the inspected evidence.
A likely alternative candidate in the inspected region was 'Hotel Miami Beach Convention Center', which also satisfied the key constraints in the high-detail VLM summary.
The initial scroll step surfaced a result with beach proximity but rating 8.0, indicating the agent continued searching rather than stopping at an insufficient candidate.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 14
suggested_followups.message: Open the final step in high detail to see why the run was considered complete.

suggested_followups.label: Compare step 13
suggested_followups.message: Compare the selected result on step 13 with the requested beach-access and rating constraints.
